title: Milkdown autosave plugin with debounced persistence
purpose: Provides a Milkdown plugin that automatically saves document changes with debouncing and supports external flush handlers.
module_context: Exports a default function 'autosavePlugin' that creates a plugin with debounced persistence logic, along with helper types and a debounced function creator.

methods.name: createDebounced
methods.normalized_params: <Args extends unknown[]>(fn: (...args: Args) => void, delay: number): DebouncedFn<Args>

steps.content: Initialize internal timer and argument storage.
Return a debounced function that delays execution of the provided function.
IF the debounced function is called again before delay, clear the previous timeout.
IF the delay expires, execute the function with the latest arguments.
Provide a flush method to immediately execute the function with latest arguments.
Provide a cancel method to clear any pending execution.
Extract plugin options including change and persistence callbacks.
Generate a unique instance identifier for tracking.
Set up internal references for change and persistence callbacks.
Create a debounced persistence function using the provided delay.
IF a flush reference is provided, assign a flush function to it.
Configure the Milkdown plugin to listen for markdown updates.
On markdown update, invoke the change callback and schedule persistence.
Return the configured plugin and listener plugin.
Get the listener context from the Milkdown plugin context.
Register a markdown update listener to track changes.
IF the markdown has changed, invoke the external change callback.
Schedule a debounced persistence of the new markdown content.
Return a cleanup function to cancel pending persistence and reset flush reference.
Clear any pending timeout.
IF there are pending arguments, execute the function with those arguments.
Clear the stored arguments after execution.
Clear any pending timeout.
Clear the stored arguments.
